title: New Developer Guide
paragraphs: If you are reading this, congratulations. You have been selected to join our developer team. Please read this guide carefully before taking commissions.

title: 1. Who We Are
paragraphs: Shrouded Development helps talented Roblox developers find reliable, high paying work without constantly searching for clients on their own.
We match clients with developers across roles such as:
Our goal is to make commissions smoother, more organized, and more professional for both developers and clients.

title: Shrouded Development helps by:
paragraphs: This allows developers to focus more on creating, while Shrouded helps with finding and organizing work.
lists: Connecting developers with paid Roblox commissions
Matching talent with suitable client projects
Providing access to better paying opportunities
Helping organize communication between clients, agents, and developers
Taking a small agency cut from completed work

title: 3. Commission Details
paragraphs: Commissions usually start at a minimum of $100 USD or 30,000 Robux, though prices can vary depending on the role, workload, deadline, and project complexity.

Some jobs may be lower or higher depending on what is required. For example, a small UI task will not be priced the same as a full scripting system, large build, animation pack, or project management role.

title: 4. Agency Cut
paragraphs: Shrouded takes an agency cut from completed commissions so we can continue bringing in clients, managing tickets, and supporting developers.
Your cut improves as you complete more commissions and demonstrate reliability. The tiers are as follows:
65% — Junior Developer
This is considered the starting cut for new developers, and a probation period.
70% — Developer
Granted after completing $350 worth of commissions successfully. You also unlock higher tier commissions, and will be prioritized for these over Junior Developers.
75% — Senior Developer

Granted after completing $2,000 worth of commissions successfully, and at least 5 separate commissions. Senior Developers also get given the ability to handle their own tickets for the most part, if they wish to.
80%+ — Partner
Reserved for long term, trusted developers. These are developers with custom deals between Shrouded and the developer.

Please keep in mind that ranks may be taken away due to inactivity, lack of cooperation, or any reason we deem appropriate. Each tier requires better communication, ability to meet deadlines, and consistent quality matching with that same tier. We may deny a tier up at any time — you’ll be given a reason as to why.

title: A few of the following reasons may be common:
lists: Breaking any of the main rules
Making the process harder than it has to be

title: 5. How Matching Works
paragraphs: When a client opens a commission ticket, Shrouded reviews the request and matches it with suitable developers.

title: Before accepting any commission, make sure you:
paragraphs: If you are unsure about a ticket, ask an agent, recruiter, or project manager before speaking in it.
lists: Understand exactly what the client wants
Have the skill required for the work
Have enough time to complete it properly
Are confident you can deliver the final product

title: 6. Ticket Rules
paragraphs: Client tickets are professional spaces. Your behavior reflects both you and Shrouded.

title: Rules:
paragraphs: Poor ticket behavior can damage client trust and may result in punishments or removal from commissions.
lists: Be professional in every client ticket
Read the full ticket before speaking
Only speak if you are seriously interested in taking the commission
Do not claim work you cannot complete
Do not leave the ticket after being matched with a client
Give updates if you need time away
Keep concerns out of client tickets
DM staff or use the correct developer channel instead

title: 7. Communication Expectations
paragraphs: Good communication is required.

title: You are expected to:
paragraphs: We understand that developers have school, work, and personal lives. However, Shrouded is still a business, and clients expect reliability.
lists: Warn staff or clients about delays
Ask questions when requirements are unclear

title: 8. Portfolios
paragraphs: Developers will be asked to send portfolios or examples of previous work. This helps us match you with the right clients.
Your portfolio should show your best relevant work, such as builds, models, scripts, systems, UI, animations, VFX, SFX, or completed Roblox projects.

title: 9. Activity Checks
paragraphs: Shrouded may run activity checks to see which developers are still active and interested in work.
If an activity check is posted, respond within the required time. Some checks may allow 48 hours, while others may allow longer.
Failure to respond may result in being marked inactive or removed from the developer roster.

title: Commissions may be paid through:
paragraphs: If you accept Robux, you will need to join the official Shrouded Development Roblox group.

title: Official Roblox Group: Open Roblox Group
paragraphs: If you only accept USD or DevEx related payments, let staff know.

title: 11. Safety
paragraphs: Only trust official Shrouded staff, agents, recruiters, and heads for agency related commissions.
If someone outside the agency contacts you claiming to represent Shrouded, confirm with staff before replying.

title: 12. Final Reminder
paragraphs: As a Shrouded developer, you represent both yourself and the agency.

title: Before taking any commission, remember:
paragraphs: Shrouded Development is here to help skilled Roblox developers connect with serious clients, stronger commissions, and better opportunities.
Welcome to Shrouded.
